description: A screenshot of an email from the Copernicus Land Monitoring Service (CLMS) confirming that a data download is ready. The email is dated "Sa 28.10.2023 06:38" and sent from "Copernicus Land Monitoring Service <copernicus@eea.europa.eu>" with the subject "Your download is ready!". The email body states: "Requested data **8337912519** can be downloaded. Please use the following URL to begin the download: https://copernicus-fme.eea.europa.eu/clmsdatadownload/results/19239.zip". The datasets listed include: "Urban Atlas Land Cover/Land Use 2018 (vector), Europe, 6-yearly - Pre-packaged". The email notes it is auto-generated because the user requested a download, and concludes with "Best regards, Copernicus Land Monitoring Service".
